11. ! [X0,X1] : ~(mountain_range(X0) & in_state(X0,texas) & mine(X1) & located_in(X1,X0) & donated(X1)) [true and false elimination 7]
13. ! [X0,X1] : (~mountain_range(X0) | ~in_state(X0,texas) | ~mine(X1) | ~located_in(X1,X0) | ~donated(X1)) [ennf transformation 11]
14. ! [X0] : (~located_in(harding,X0) | ~mountain_range(X0) | ~in_state(X0,new_mexico)) [ennf transformation 10]
15. mountain_range(picuris) [cnf transformation 1]
16. in_state(picuris,new_mexico) | in_state(picuris,texas) [cnf transformation 2]
17. mine(harding) [cnf transformation 4]
18. located_in(harding,picuris) [cnf transformation 5]

25. ~located_in(harding,X0) | ~mountain_range(X0) | ~in_state(X0,new_mexico) [cnf transformation 14]
27. 1 <=> in_state(picuris,texas) [avatar definition]
29. in_state(picuris,texas) <- (1) [avatar component clause 27]
31. 2 <=> in_state(picuris,new_mexico) [avatar definition]

39. ~in_state(picuris,texas) | ~mine(harding) | ~mountain_range(picuris) | ~donated(harding) [resolution 20,18]
40. ~mine(harding) | ~mountain_range(picuris) | ~donated(harding) <- (1) [forward subsumption resolution 39,29]
